title: Uttaman Introduction (Villuppattu) Lyrics Uttama Villain Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Uttaman Introduction (Villuppattu)
Singer(s): Subbu Arumugam, Kamal Haasan
Lyrics: Subbu Arumugam
Music: M Ghibran

Thandhanaththom endru solliye
villinil paada (aamaa)
villinil paada
vandharulvaai kalaimagalae.

Thaanathandhathtodu
iru sandhangalum thaazhathodu
sandhangalum thaazhaththodu
vaana vambai uruviththa kai
mun thoomiyodu (aama)
mun thoomiyodu
aththanayum melaththodu

Thenpaandi seemaikootu
chera naattu thaiyyam serthu
chera naattu thaiyyam serthu
arjunaru vaasu pradhaas thaan
paandi nagarai (aamaa)
paandi nagarai
amarkkalamaa aala porom.

Mela vaanam keela boomi
maththiyilum uthama villain (+Narendhiran Sathyamoorthy )
maththiyilum uthama villain
arithaaram poosum saami
ulagathukku (aamaa)
ulagathukku
ubagaari bhramma nyaani.

Arasiyal vaadhi avan
unmayai sonnar pol
adhisayam naanum kandaen.

nayanarga sidhasoodal
abai avargal modhidave
sagala kalai thaerchi pettren.

Aaadhi sivan paadhi umai
adhisayitha thavamo.
arjunarin per sonnaal
achcham urumulano.

thangal arulal pongum mangalam
engum thandhidave. (provided by +PRAKSHITH S )
siva siva siva sivakamikku
thillai natagaraaja.

Sambalam indri nadanamaadum
ambala nataraaja.
thandhanam kondu thaiyyam aadum
arjuna maharaaja.

orukaal thooki aaduvadheno
irukaal aattam mayakkam thaano.

siru siru kinjai
karaththil uduththi.
arugil mangai
arulum mannai.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song reflects the vibrant and rich traditions of Tamil culture, celebrating the art of storytelling.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the movie Uthama Villain.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Kamal Haasan and Subbu Arumugam.

Who is the lyricist for this song?

The lyrics are penned by Subbu Arumugam.

When was the song released?

The song was released on March 1, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Uttaman Introduction (Villuppattu), the vibrant energy of the song encapsulates the essence of Tamil storytelling, making it a standout piece in Uthama Villain. The lively duet by Kamal Haasan and Subbu Arumugam evokes feelings of nostalgia while celebrating cultural heritage. The song serves as an introduction to the film's themes, blending traditional elements with modern flair. Its upbeat rhythm and engaging lyrics make it perfect for celebrations and parties.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Uttaman Introduction (Villuppattu) from Uthama Villain is a vibrant celebration of Tamil culture, showcasing the unique collaboration between the legendary Kamal Haasan and the talented Subbu Arumugam. This song captures the essence of traditional storytelling through its lively beats and engaging lyrics. Dive into this musical journey that perfectly blends nostalgia with energetic vibes!
stanzaMeanings: We sing in the village saying we are here, yes, we are here to share our knowledge.
With our own identity, we have conflicts and with the earth, we have conflicts, and with the sky, we have a hand that creates.
In the southern land, the local traditions come together, Arjuna's presence is the pride of the southern city, yes, the pride of the southern city, we will go with the immortals.
Above the sky and below the earth, the great villain, in the world, the great villain brings joy to the world, yes, to the world, a joyful Brahma.
In politics, he speaks the truth, like a miracle, I have also seen.
The eyes are the divine dance, they have mastered all the arts.
In the beginning, Shiva half of Uma, is it a wonder? When Arjuna's name is called, is there fear?
The passion will become the eighth breath. The victorious one is the great artist of the world. Shiva... is a wonder.
Your blessings will bring prosperity everywhere.
Without wealth, the dance of the divine dancer continues. With the gift, Arjuna dances.
Is it a time to lift and dance? Is it a game of illusion?
Small, small offerings are given in the hands. Nearby, the goddess blesses the land.
